{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232010448E70239F686A3B9EFB4D"}"},"total":91},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613853052181807897","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感官上很好，虚构和现实结合的女人物，一开始还觉得有点奇怪，接受后反而会好很多乏味感不会涌上来太快，兼顾两种感觉现实和虚构各有春秋。
杀伐果断，收女速度也快，实力变强也不墨迹，就是后宫固定了吗，如果有后续扩张会不会是已经…就看作者怎么写了。","text_exts":[{"e":70,"s":66,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742678443B9EFB4D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227613853052181807897%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227602140590058245182%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772749991,"group_id":"7602140590058245182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"没什么想看的，想自己写本看看","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5jWzo63aU7QkwSKXmK62LJ5f8HVEiAz88YMh92H0Eqv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/73807a6e209c4f6fb1efce5f4e377b93~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791932&x-signature=FeMNMPROtAdSxKuJAtRXY99ANTE%3D","user_id":"1692894685046828","user_name":"晚枫航"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1692894685046828","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705713967,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602140590058245182","book_info":{"abstract":"【迷雾求生】+【双修系统】+【多女主】+【杀伐果断】
神秘力量将全球的人带到充满迷雾的异世界，进行残酷求生。
林昊醒来，发现自己船上有着10个极品女明星。
他是唯一的男人。
而且还绑定了一个有点不正经的金手指，双修系统。
只要和符合系统标准的目标双修，就能得到奖励。
累计次数越多，奖励就越丰富。
林昊本来不是花心大萝卜的，但奈何系统给的太多了。
【叮！初次双修，获得特殊天赋‘复制’！】
【累计双修100次，奖励……】

_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7620038986652418841","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很好看，尤其是在描写吕布为了貂蝉跟孙悟空。大战几百汇合，但是薛宝钗确实太强了，要不是诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头台，这波m4六倍扫射必死。
但我比较心思诸葛亮对花果山108个猴子说的一句话"小伙子一身傲骨，别在你亮哥面前摆谱"，表现出诸葛亮对猴子三棒敲死他的愤慨。总而言之，这本书情节有趣，体系明确，伏笔众多。打斗场面如身临其境，人物格描述也很到位！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774181264,"group_id":"7602140590058245182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwpXfjVwbTCBYsSQh56PSLB0JzcWXQqyrtQ9jxlilYaX","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/63271a002e2f4b3e800cf6223c3ef2d6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796436&x-signature=Qt7rSSvyeba9azgJh3qqfQLgbeI%3D","user_id":"3491659658822599","user_name":"逆光而行的人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3491659658822599","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602140590058245182","book_info":{"abstract":"【迷雾求生】+【双修系统】+【多女主】+【杀伐果断】
